'''鈭歜-b-w''' ('''kababaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:himpathize|himpathize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:himpathize|himpathize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kababaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibabaw|thibabaw]] || [[word:jibabaw|jibabaw]] || [[word:shibabaw|shibabaw]] || [[word:kibabaw|kibabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubabaw|thuthubabaw]] || [[word:jujubabaw|jujubabaw]] || [[word:shushubabaw|shushubabaw]] || [[word:kukubabaw|kukubabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubabaw|thubabaw]] || [[word:jubabaw|jubabaw]] || [[word:shubabaw|shubabaw]] || [[word:kubabaw|kubabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubabaw|thubabaw]] || [[word:jubabaw|jubabaw]] || [[word:shubabaw|shubabaw]] || [[word:kubabaw|kubabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebabaw|thebabaw]] || [[word:jebabaw|jebabaw]] || [[word:shebabaw|shebabaw]] || [[word:kebabaw|kebabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobabaw|thothobabaw]] || [[word:jojobabaw|jojobabaw]] || [[word:shoshobabaw|shoshobabaw]] || [[word:kokobabaw|kokobabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobabaw|thobabaw]] || [[word:jobabaw|jobabaw]] || [[word:shobabaw|shobabaw]] || [[word:kobabaw|kobabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobabaw|thobabaw]] || [[word:jobabaw|jobabaw]] || [[word:shobabaw|shobabaw]] || [[word:kobabaw|kobabaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]] || [[word:babaw|babaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙babaw|th忙babaw]] || [[word:j忙babaw|j忙babaw]] || [[word:sh忙babaw|sh忙babaw]] || [[word:k忙babaw|k忙babaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathababaw|thathababaw]] || [[word:jajababaw|jajababaw]] || [[word:shashababaw|shashababaw]] || [[word:kakababaw|kakababaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thababaw|thababaw]] || [[word:jababaw|jababaw]] || [[word:shababaw|shababaw]] || [[word:kababaw|kababaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thababaw|thababaw]] || [[word:jababaw|jababaw]] || [[word:shababaw|shababaw]] || [[word:kababaw|kababaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shababaw|shababaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshababaw|goshababaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishababaw|gokishababaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shababawn眉|shababawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshababawnkn眉|goshababawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishababawn眉|gokishababawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shababawsh毛|shababawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshababawnksh毛|goshababawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishababawsh毛|gokishababawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shababawro|shababawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshababawnkro|goshababawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishababawro|gokishababawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shababawmu|shababawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshababawnkmu|goshababawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababawmu|gokishababawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shababawsher|shababawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshababawnksher|goshababawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishababawsher|gokishababawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shababawng|shababawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshababawnkng|goshababawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishababawng|gokishababawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shababawya|shababawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshababawnkya|goshababawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishababawya|gokishababawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shababawyam|shababawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshababawnkyam|goshababawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishababawyam|gokishababawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shababawn眉sh毛|shababawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshababawnkn眉sh毛|goshababawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishababawn眉sh毛|gokishababawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shababawn眉ro|shababawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshababawnkn眉ro|goshababawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishababawn眉ro|gokishababawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababawn眉mu|shababawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshababawnkn眉mu|goshababawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababawn眉mu|gokishababawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shababawsh毛n眉|shababawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshababawnksh毛n眉|goshababawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishababawsh毛n眉|gokishababawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shababawsh毛ro|shababawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshababawnksh毛ro|goshababawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishababawsh毛ro|gokishababawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababawsh毛mu|shababawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshababawnksh毛mu|goshababawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababawsh毛mu|gokishababawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shababawron眉|shababawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshababawnkron眉|goshababawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishababawron眉|gokishababawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shababawrosh毛|shababawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshababawnkrosh毛|goshababawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishababawrosh毛|gokishababawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababawromu|shababawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshababawnkromu|goshababawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababawromu|gokishababawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shababawmun眉|shababawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshababawnkmun眉|goshababawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishababawmun眉|gokishababawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shababawmush毛|shababawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshababawnkmush毛|goshababawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishababawmush毛|gokishababawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shababawmuro|shababawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshababawnkmuro|goshababawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishababawmuro|gokishababawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
